headline: Jim Cramer on Fair Isaac: “I’m Not Going to Get Into That Hornet’s Nest”
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) was among Jim Cramer’s recent stock calls on Mad Money. A caller asked what Cramer thinks about buying FICO shares, given the stock’s recent decline. He replied: Okay, here’s the problem: I think FICO is not as easily disrupted as the market thinks, but as long as it’s out there, every […]

headline: Intuit's TurboTax & AI Push: Can DIY Tax Trends Fuel Future Growth?
summary: INTU rides on the DIY tax boom as TurboTax growth, AI integration and faster filings drive strong Q2 revenue gains and reshape tax prep experience.

raw.headline: Intuit's TurboTax & AI Push: Can DIY Tax Trends Fuel Future Growth?

headline: Adobe's Shantanu Narayen and Nvidia's Jensen Huang on CEO Transitions: Fortt Knox
summary: At Adobe Summit, weeks after announcing his CEO transition, Shantanu Narayen reflects with Jensen Huang. Huang calls Adobe unmatched at "how the world tells stories" and says its market opportunity just grew 100–1,000× with Firefly running on NVIDIA's stack — Omniverse, CUDA, Cosmos, NeMo — plus agentic AI encoding Adobe's marketing know-how into agents. Narayen's playbook: innovate, expand the lens, use M&A before the market sees the category.
